title: Workday Stock Is A Good Pick To Realize Gains
text: The shares of Workday have gained 27% since February 2020, almost comparable to the market leader Automatic Data Processing. In recent years, Workday's revenues have grown at an annual rate of 26% pushing investor confidence in the stock.

title: Kainos Group confirms sixth Workday services partner acquisition
text: Kainos (LSE:KNOS) Group PLC said it has acquired fellow US-based Blackline Group, which is a fellow provider of Workday finance and human resources services. Blackline, which was established in 2009, helps companies with overcoming critical procurement challenges and has assisted some large firms transform over US$100bn in total spend.
